top_signals.title: Ukraine’s Drone Warfare Redefines Battlefield Dynamics
top_signals.summary: Ukraine’s extensive use of approximately 10,000 drones daily has significantly impacted Russian forces, causing 90% of their casualties and rendering traditional armored vehicles and tanks largely ineffective near the front lines. Bloomberg's Chief Europe Correspondent Oliver Crook joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss a recent drone incursion into Romanian airspace that has raised European security concerns. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Senator Lummis says China will 'write the rules' of the new financial era if CLARITY fails
top_signals.summary: The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance the CLARITY Act in May, but it must still pass both chambers of Congress before heading to the president's desk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morocco Is Emerging as a Renewable Energy Superpower
top_signals.summary: Morocco is rapidly becoming a renewable energy powerhouse thanks to its favourable weather conditions and proximity to Europe. The North African country has rapidly developed its solar energy sector and is now looking to become a major green hydrogen and sustainable shipping hub. Morocco has long been heavily dependent on fossil fuel imports and continues to use coal to produce around 60 percent of its electricity. However, in recent years, it has been working to develop its renewable energy sources, with high levels of private investment in the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: CFTC opens door for crypto perpetual future contracts in US as Coinbase, Kalshi move forward
top_signals.summary: The CFTC opened the doors for perpetual futures contracts, giving way for Kalshi and Coinbase to offer those products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum’s US comeback hinges on power, not tariffs, industry advocates say
top_signals.summary: Century Aluminum’s proposed smelter in Oklahoma remains dependent on securing a long-term electricity agreement.
